profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for Fast-hosted data services.

service.name: Cheerio Scraper
service.tagline: Run high-performance HTTP crawling and custom HTML extraction through a Fast-native async proxy.
service.about: Cheerio Scraper exposes an Apify-backed HTTP crawler through the marketplace for high-throughput scraping on sites that do not require JavaScript rendering and where a custom Cheerio page function is the right fit.
service.promptIntro: I want to use the Cheerio Scraper service on Fast Marketplace.
setupInstructions: Fund a Fast wallet on mainnet.
Provide start URLs and a Cheerio-compatible pageFunction to extract the fields you need.
Keep the returned job token and poll the marketplace job route for completion.

endpoints.title: Crawl HTML
endpoints.description: Crawl non-JavaScript sites over HTTP and extract data with a Cheerio page function.

requestExample.pageFunction: async function pageFunction(context) { const { $, request } = context; return { url: request.url, title: $('title').text().trim() }; }

endpoints.usageNotes: Use this instead of the browser-based Web Scraper when the target site is static enough for raw HTTP and you want lower cost and higher throughput.
